text: Entering this space, I sense anticipation and curiosity. The clean lines and glass suggest openness, but also serve as a barrier to what lies within. As I step closer to the R+D exhibit, the language on the wall—about contemplation, uncertainty, and reflection—calls forth a contemplative mood in me. I feel eager to explore, but also slightly unsettled by the philosophical invitation to pause, listen, and reflect. Here, I am both observer and participant in an evolving dialogue between knowledge and mystery.
